title: Applications and Submissions - Canada.ca
content:
## Applications and Submissions
As per the Natural Health Products Regulations , product and site licences are required before a natural health product can be marketed in Canada. This section explains what applications and submissions are required to meet the requirements of the Natural Health Products Regulations . In addition, all the tools necessary for the industry to come into compliance with the Natural Health Products Regulations are available in the topics area to the left of your screen.
Information on natural health products that have been licensed for sale in Canada is available in the Licensed Natural Health Products Database . A site licence holders list is also available online.

## Natural Health Products
- Natural Health Product Clinical Trials : Request for contact information for Submission Coordinator Pre-submission meeting requests Inquiries regarding authorization and conduct of human Clinical Trials involving investigational natural health products
